BOTH PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN JANUARY 17, 2025. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher G. Michel and John Potter for Ayman Farahat, Plaintiff.
Aaron I. Wiener for City and County of San Francisco, Defendant.

Counsel for Defendant contested the court's tentative decision. After review of the pleadings and hearing oral argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiffs state sufficient facts to support their causes of action for proper relief.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Justus Balentine, CSR #13859, justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com, 714-471-2597. (D501)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AYMAN FARAHAT, JOYCE FERMAN, DAVID HALL, DAVID QUINBY, HARSHIL VED's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiffs AYMAN FARAHAT, JOYCE FERMAN, DAVID HALL, DAVID QUINBY, HARSHIL VED's Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED. Counsel Christopher G. Michel may appear as counsel pro hac vice for moving parties in this action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on January 27, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property/nuisance cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Both parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than January 17, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Continued To Dec-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
